title: cmux-extension.json
description: Manifest for a cmux Dock TUI extension. cmux validates the manifest before installing and starts each pane command as the signed-in user.

$schema.description: Optional schema URL for editor completion and validation.

manifestVersion.description: Manifest format version. Version 1 is the current extension manifest format.

id.description: Stable extension identifier used for config, state, and consent records.

name.description: Human-readable extension name shown in cmux.

version.description: Extension version string shown during review and install.

description.description: Optional short summary of what the extension does.

minCmuxVersion.description: Optional minimum cmux version required by this extension.

icon.description: Optional icon name or asset identifier shown beside the extension.

build.description: Commands cmux can run before launching extension panes.

panes.description: Dock panes provided by this extension.

platforms.description: Optional platform filter for the extension or command.

env.description: Environment variables passed only to this pane.

id.description: Stable pane identifier within the extension.

title.description: Pane title shown in the Dock.

command.description: Command argv to run for this pane.

cwd.description: Optional working directory relative to the extension root.

placement.description: Optional placement hint for where cmux should show the pane.
